_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: FLAG-WT and mutant neurofibromin immunoprecipitates (IPs) from 293T NF1−/− were tested for dimerization
details: Successfully used for immunoprecipitation of FLAG-tagged neurofibromin to detect dimerization, SPRED1 interaction, ubiquitination, and HSP70 binding
